experience.title: Media Manager
responsibilities: Developed and implemented media strategies to enhance brand visibility.
Managed social media platforms and engaged with followers to increase audience interaction.
Produced video content and promotional materials to support marketing initiatives.
Coordinated with graphic designers and content creators to deliver high-quality media assets.

experience.title: Event Coordinator
responsibilities: Planned and executed corporate events and community outreach programs.
Collaborated with vendors and sponsors to ensure seamless event operations.
Managed event budgets and tracked expenditures to maximize profitability.
Generated post-event reports to assess success and areas for improvement.

response.summary: Highly organized Media Manager with a background in event coordination and communications. Skilled in developing media strategies and fostering audience engagement, seeking to transition into a new field where strong project management and communication skills can be leveraged.
